subject: fix(pwa): detect Brave Mobile via navigator.brave API
body:
Brave Mobile strips "Brave" from the user agent string, causing
detectBrowser() to misidentify it as Chrome. This led to misleading
"Install Prompt" diagnostics. Now checks navigator.brave API first
(synchronous property check), then falls back to UA string matching.

Also updates the Install Prompt diagnostic message — the old message
suggested a timing bug ("may have fired before React mounted") which
was inaccurate since the index.html early-capture script handles that
case. New message explains the actual common causes: engagement
heuristics and browser privacy settings.

Tags: pwa, brave, browser-detection, diagnostics, mobile
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-install
Semver: patch

title: detect Brave Mobile via navigator.brave API
